learning_delta: V0.1 static Rich snapshot becomes V0.2 personal Textual client.
PowerShell scroll problem is avoided by staying inside an app surface.
Future action sockets remain visually stable for later buttons.

pain_pattern.symptom: Rich snapshot prints into PowerShell history and forces Owner to scroll.
pain_pattern.mitigation: Use Textual client / alternate-screen TUI instead of one-shot static print.
